summary.text: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family formed on the extrasolar moon Pandora. Once a familiar threat returns to finish what was previously started, Jake must work with Neytiri and the army of the Na'vi race to protect their home.

awards.title: MTV Movie Award
nominations: Best Performance in a Show (Elizabeth Olsen)

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Blends the style of classic sitcoms with the MCU, in which Wanda Maximoff and Vision - two super-powered beings living their ideal suburban lives - begin to suspect that everything is not as it seems.
A quirky, dysfunctional family's road trip is upended when they find themselves in the middle of the robot apocalypse and suddenly become humanity's unlikeliest last hope.

title: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier

character.name: James "Bucky" Barnes / Winter Soldier / White Wolf
John Walker / Captain America / U.S. Agent

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Following the events of «Avengers: Endgame» Sam Wilson and Bucky Barnes team up in a global adventure that tests their abilities and their patience.

For the first time in the cinematic history of Spider-Man, our friendly neighborhood hero is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a Super Hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange, the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings

summary.text: Shang-Chi, the master of unarmed weaponry-based Kung Fu, is forced to confront his past after being drawn into the Ten Rings organization.
In a realm known as Kumandra, a re-imagined Earth inhabited by an ancient civilization, a warrior named Raya is determined to find the last dragon.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: The mercurial villain Loki resumes his role as the God of Mischief in a new series that takes place after the events of «Avengers: Endgame».

Determined to ensure Superman's ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne aligns forces with Diana Prince with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Series based on the Marvel Comics superhero Hawkeye, centering on the adventures of Young Avenger, Kate M. Bishop, who took on the role after the original Avenger, Clint Barton.
The saga of the Eternals, a race of immortal beings who lived on Earth and shaped its history and civilizations.
Feature adaptation of Frank Herbert's science fiction novel, about the son of a noble family entrusted with the protection of the most valuable asset and most vital element in the galaxy.
Natasha Romanoff confronts the darker parts of her ledger when a dangerous conspiracy with ties to her past arises.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Set in utopian Piltover and the oppressed underground of Zaun, the story follows the origins of two iconic League champions-and the power that will tear them apart.

Following the events at home, the Abbott family now face the terrors of the outside world. Forced to venture into the unknown, they realize the creatures that hunt by sound are not the only threats lurking beyond the sand path.

awards.title: Golden Globe
nominations: Best Motion Picture Made for Television
Best Performance by an Actress in a Motion Picture Made for Television

awards.title: Critics Choice Award
nominations: Best Actress in a Limited Series or a Movie Made for Television

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Orphaned at the tender age of nine, prodigious introvert Beth Harmon discovers and masters the game of chess in 1960s USA. But child stardom comes at a price.
A sled dog struggles for survival in the wilds of the Yukon.

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: Armed with only one word, Tenet, and fighting for the survival of the entire world, a Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time.
Seven years after he survived the monster apocalypse, lovably hapless Joel leaves his cozy underground bunker behind on a quest to reunite with his ex.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: The Locke family relocates to their ancestral home, Keyhouse, after a tragic event. They discover mystical keys that unlock supernatural powers and dark secrets hidden within the mansion. As they use the keys, they unwittingly awaken a sinister force that threatens them and the world.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: The Locke family continues to explore the magical keys and their origins, leading to new challenges and threats. They face off against ancient enemies and strive to protect their family and the world from dark forces unleashed by the keys.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: In this season, the Locke family must confront new and old enemies while dealing with the consequences of their actions. The fate of Keyhouse and the world hangs in the balance as they unlock more mysteries of the keys.
A family struggles for survival in the face of a cataclysmic natural disaster.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: In the first season, Geralt of Rivia, a monster hunter known as a Witcher, navigates a world filled with dangerous creatures and complex political intrigue. He crosses paths with Yennefer, a powerful sorceress, and Ciri, a young princess with a destiny tied to his own. The three destinies converge in a world where the line between good and evil is blurred.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: Geralt embraces his destiny as he protects Ciri from the forces battling for control of the Continent — and from the mysterious power she possesses.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: In the first season, a dysfunctional family of adopted super-powered siblings reunites after the mysterious death of their adoptive father. They must work together to solve the mystery and prevent an impending global apocalypse while dealing with their own complex relationships and personal issues.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: The second season sees the siblings time-travel to the 1960s, where they must once again prevent a doomsday event. Each sibling faces new challenges and adventures in a different era, all while trying to reunite and make sense of the temporal chaos they find themselves in.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: Back at the Academy, the Umbrellas clash with a new squad of Hargreeves siblings as a mysterious force begins to wreak havoc on the city.

awards.title: Emmy
nominations: Outstanding Cinematography for a Single-Camera Series (Half-Hour)
Outstanding Music Composition for a Series (Original Dramatic Score)
Outstanding Production Design for a Narrative Program (Half-Hour)
Outstanding Stunt Coordination for a Drama Series Limited Series or Movie
Outstanding Sound Editing for a Comedy or Drama Series (Half-Hour) and Animation
Outstanding Sound Mixing for a Comedy or Drama Series (Half-Hour) and Animation

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Set in the Star Wars universe, the first season follows a lone bounty hunter known as the Mandalorian. His quest to capture a mysterious and powerful child, referred to as "The Child" but commonly known as Baby Yoda, leads to a series of adventures across the galaxy. He must protect the child from various threats and uncover the secrets of its origins.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: In the second season, the Mandalorian continues his journey with Baby Yoda, searching for other Mandalorians who can help him return the child to its people. Their quest leads them to encounters with familiar and new characters, as well as deeper involvement in the events of the broader Star Wars galaxy.
An American expat tries to sell off his highly profitable marijuana empire in London, triggering plots, schemes, bribery and blackmail in an attempt to steal his domain out from under him.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor

summary.text: Following the events of Endgame, Spider-Man must step up to take on new threats in a world that has changed forever.

We all have a superhero inside us, it just takes a bit of magic to bring it out. In Billy Batson's case, by shouting out one word - SHAZAM! - this streetwise fourteen-year-old foster kid can turn into the adult superhero Shazam.

A simple act of kindness always sparks another, even in a frozen, faraway place. When Smeerensburg's new postman, Jesper, befriends toymaker Klaus, their gifts melt an age-old feud and deliver a sleigh full of holiday traditions.

title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World

summary.text: When Hiccup discovers Toothless isn't the only Night Fury, he must seek "The Hidden World", a secret Dragon Utopia before a hired tyrant named Grimmel finds it first.

American car designer Carroll Shelby and driver Ken Miles battle corporate interference and the laws of physics to build a revolutionary race car for Ford in order to defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans in 1966.

awards.title: Emmy
nominations: Outstanding Directing for a Limited Series
Outstanding Writing for a Limited Series
Outstanding Cinematography for a Limited Series or Movie
Outstanding Production Design for a Narrative Period or Fantasy Program (One Hour or More)
Outstanding Music Composition for a Limited Series
Outstanding Single-Camera Picture Editing for a Limited Series or Movie
Outstanding Sound Mixing for a Limited Series or Movie
Outstanding Sound Editing for a Limited Series
Outstanding Special Visual Effects in a Supporting Role,

awards.title: Critics Choice Award
nominations: Best Supporting Actor in a Limited Series or Movie Made for Television (Stellan Skarsgård)

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: In April 1986, an explosion at the Chernobyl nuclear power plant in the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics becomes one of the world's worst man-made catastrophes.
Carol Danvers becomes one of the universe's most powerful heroes when Earth is caught in the middle of a galactic war between two alien races.

awards.title: MTV Movie Award
nominations: Best Hero (Robert Downey Jr. as Tony Stark)

summary.text: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more in order to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe.
A deactivated female cyborg is revived, but cannot remember anything of her past life and goes on a quest to find out who she is.

title: The Maze Runner: The Death Cure

summary.text: Young hero Thomas embarks on a mission to find a cure for a deadly disease known as "The Flare".
The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation and ruin puts an end to the universe.
Teen Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man of his reality, crossing his path with five counterparts from other dimensions to stop a threat for all realities.
During an adventure into the criminal underworld, Han Solo meets his future co-pilot Chewbacca and encounters Lando Calrissian years before joining the Rebellion.
When the creator of a virtual reality world called the OASIS dies, he releases a video in which he challenges all OASIS users to find his Easter Egg, which will give the finder his fortune
Ethan Hunt and his IMF team, along with some familiar allies, race against time after a mission gone wrong.

awards.title: Oscar
nominations: Best Achievement in Music Written for Motion Pictures (Original Score)

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: After the death of his father, Prince T'Challa ascends to the throne of the small African country of Wakanda. T'Challa is also Black Panther, superhero. Now not only must he govern his country but defeat a dangerous adversary.
Arthur Curry, the human-born heir to the underwater kingdom of Atlantis, goes on a quest to prevent a war between the worlds of ocean and land.

As Scott Lang balances being both a Super Hero and a father, Hope van Dyne and Dr. Hank Pym present an urgent new mission that finds the Ant-Man fighting alongside The Wasp to uncover secrets from their past.
In a post-apocalyptic world, a family is forced to live in silence while hiding from monsters with ultra-sensitive hearing.
When a pilot crashes and tells of conflict in the outside world, Diana, an Amazonian warrior in training, leaves home to fight a war, discovering her full powers and true destiny.
Thor is imprisoned on the planet Sakaar, and must race against time to return to Asgard and stop Ragnarцk, the destruction of his world, at the hands of the powerful and ruthless villain Hela.

title: Star Wars Episode VIII: The Last Jedi

summary.text: Rey develops her newly discovered abilities with the guidance of Luke Skywalker, who is unsettled by the strength of her powers. Meanwhile, the Resistance prepares for battle with the First Order.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor

summary.text: Peter Parker balances his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, and finds himself on the trail of a new menace prowling the skies of New York City.
When a murder occurs on the train on which he's travelling, celebrated detective Hercule Poirot is recruited to solve the case.
In a future where mutants are nearly extinct, an elderly and weary Logan leads a quiet life. But when Laura, a mutant child pursued by scientists, comes to him for help, he must get her to safety.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy: Vol. II

summary.text: The Guardians must fight to keep their newfound family together as they unravel the mystery of Peter Quill's true parentage.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: In the small town of Winden, a mysterious child disappearance reveals the existence of a time loop spanning over a century. Four interconnected families uncover their past secrets as they try to unravel the mysteries of time travel and the elusive concept of the 'origin.'

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: As the time loop's complexities deepen, the characters navigate multiple time periods while confronting the impending apocalypse. Tensions rise, family bonds are strained, and the intricate web of time travel's consequences becomes even more convoluted.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: In the final season, Winden faces its ultimate fate, and the characters must confront the origin of the time loop. Time travel takes them to different dimensions, and they strive to break the cycle to save their world from annihilation, all while exploring the timeless questions of destiny, free will, and the eternal battle between light and shadow.
The story of Barry Seal, an American pilot who became a drug-runner for the CIA in the 1980s in a clandestine operation that would be exposed as the Iran-Contra Affair.

awards.title: Oscar
nominations: Best Animated Feature Film of the Year

summary.text: In a city of anthropomorphic animals, a rookie bunny cop and a cynical con artist fox must work together to uncover a conspiracy.
Two strangers find themselves linked in a bizarre way. When a connection forms, will distance be the only thing to keep them apart?
In the 1980s the X-Men must defeat an ancient all-powerful mutant, En Sabah Nur, who intends to thrive through bringing destruction to the world.
As an Orc horde invades the planet Azeroth using a magic portal, a few human heroes and dissenting Orcs must attempt to stop the true evil behind this war.

awards.title: Oscar
nominations: Best Achievement in Makeup and Hairstyling

awards.title: Critics Choice Award
nominations: Best Actress in an Action Movie

summary.text: A secret government agency recruits some of the most dangerous incarcerated super-villains to form a defensive task force. Their first mission: save the world from the apocalypse.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Supporting Actress in Streaming Presentation

awards.title: Critics Choice Award
nominations: Best Supporting Actor in a Drama Series

awards.title: Emmy
nominations: Outstanding Sound Editing for a Comedy or Drama Series (One Hour)
Outstanding Original Main Title Theme Music
Outstanding Casting for a Drama Series
Outstanding Single-Camera Picture Editing for a Drama Series
Outstanding Sound Editing for a Series

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: Set in the 1980s in the town of Hawkins, Indiana, the first season follows the disappearance of a young boy and the mysterious appearance of a girl with psychokinetic abilities. A group of friends embarks on a quest to find their missing friend while uncovering supernatural mysteries. The arrival of a sinister force known as the Demogorgon leads to a parallel dimension known as the Upside Down.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: In the second season, a year after the events of the first season, Hawkins faces a new supernatural threat. The group of friends reunites to confront a shadowy entity that threatens the town, and they learn more about the Upside Down. Eleven, the psychokinetic girl, seeks her past and abilities.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: Set during the summer of 1985, Season 3 follows the group of friends as they face new challenges, both supernatural and personal. The town's new mall hides a dark secret, and the Russians play a significant role in the unfolding mysteries. The Mind Flayer returns, and Hawkins is once again in grave danger.

summary.title: Season 4
summary.text: Darkness returns to Hawkins just in time for spring break, igniting fresh terror, disturbing memories — and an ominous new threat.
The crew of the USS Enterprise explores the furthest reaches of uncharted space, where they encounter a new ruthless enemy, who puts them, and everything the Federation stands for, to the test.
The daughter of an Imperial scientist joins the Rebel Alliance in a risky move to steal the Death Star plans.
A spacecraft traveling to a distant colony planet and transporting thousands of people has a malfunction in its sleep chambers. As a result, two passengers are awakened 90 years early.

title: Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children

summary.text: When Jacob discovers clues to a mystery that stretches across time, he finds Miss Peregrine's Home for Peculiar Children. But the danger deepens after he gets to know the residents and learns about their special powers.
While on a journey of physical and spiritual healing, a brilliant neurosurgeon is drawn into the world of the mystic arts.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor (Tom Holland)

summary.text: Political involvement in the Avengers' activities causes a rift between Captain America and Iron Man.

title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice

summary.text: Fearing that the actions of Superman are left unchecked, Batman takes on the Man of Steel, while the world wrestles with what kind of a hero it really needs.
In 1974, high-wire artist Philippe Petit recruits a team of people to help him realize his dream: to walk the immense void between the World Trade Center towers.

title: The Maze Runner: The Scorch Trials

summary.text: After having escaped the Maze, the Gladers now face a new set of challenges on the open roads of a desolate landscape filled with unimaginable obstacles.

awards.title: Golden Globes
nominations: Best Motion Picture - Comedy or Musical
Best Performance by an Actor in a Motion Picture - Comedy or Musical

summary.text: An astronaut becomes stranded on Mars after his team assume him dead, and must rely on his ingenuity to find a way to signal to Earth that he is alive.

In the early 1960s, CIA agent Napoleon Solo and KGB operative Illya Kuryakin participate in a joint mission against a mysterious criminal organization, which is working to proliferate nuclear weapons.
Katniss and a team of rebels from District 13 prepare for the final battle that will decide the fate of Panem.

When Tony Stark and Bruce Banner try to jump-start a dormant peacekeeping program called Ultron, things go horribly wrong and it's up to Earth's mightiest heroes to stop the villainous Ultron from enacting his terrible plan.

title: Star Wars Episode VII: The Force Awakens

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: Three decades after the Empire's defeat, a new threat arises in the militant First Order. Stormtrooper defector Finn and the scavenger Rey are caught up in the Resistance's search for the missing Luke Skywalker.
Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating the Syndicate - an International rogue organization as highly skilled as they are, committed to destroying the IMF.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor (Ty Simpkins)

summary.text: A new theme park, built on the original site of Jurassic Park, creates a genetically modified hybrid dinosaur, the Indominus Rex, which escapes containment and goes on a killing spree.
Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.
In the midst of veteran con man Nicky's latest scheme, a woman from his past - now an accomplished femme fatale - shows up and throws his plans for a loop.

Armed with a super-suit with the astonishing ability to shrink in scale but increase in strength, cat burglar Scott Lang must embrace his inner hero and help his mentor, Dr. Hank Pym, plan and pull off a heist that will save the world.
The X-Men send Wolverine to the past in a desperate effort to change history and prevent an event that results in doom for both humans and mutants.
Thomas is deposited in a community of boys after his memory is erased, soon learning they're all trapped in a maze that will require him to join forces with fellow "runners" for a shot at escape.

Katniss Everdeen is in District 13 after she shatters the games forever. Under the leadership of President Coin and the advice of her trusted friends, Katniss spreads her wings as she fights to save Peeta and a nation moved by her courage.

title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies

summary.text: Bilbo and company are forced to engage in a war against an array of combatants and keep the Lonely Mountain from falling into the hands of a rising darkness.

title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2: Rise of Electro

summary.text: When New York is put under siege by Oscorp, it is up to Spider-Man to save the city he swore to protect as well as his loved ones.

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: In a post-apocalyptic world, 100 delinquent juvenile prisoners are sent to Earth from a dying space station to determine if the planet is habitable again. They encounter a wide range of dangers and face the struggle for survival, while uncovering the mysteries of Earth's past.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: The survivors of the previous season continue to explore the Earth, but they face new threats, including warring factions, an artificial intelligence known as A.L.I.E., and a mysterious underground society known as the Grounders. Their fight for survival intensifies as they discover the truth about the Ark's survival on Earth.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: In the third season, the conflict between the Arkers and the Grounders escalates as the threat of the AI A.L.I.E. becomes more pronounced. The group must navigate political intrigue and ethical dilemmas as they strive to save humanity from a looming apocalypse.

summary.title: Season 4
summary.text: With the impending nuclear apocalypse threatening to wipe out all life on Earth, the characters must work together to find a solution. Tensions rise as the group faces difficult choices and scientific challenges in a race against time.

summary.title: Season 5
summary.text: Season 5 picks up after a six-year time jump, as the survivors face new dangers on Earth, including a mysterious Eligius Corporation group and an overgrowing valley called the Shallow Valley. The conflicts between the various factions continue to test loyalties and survival skills.

summary.title: Season 6
summary.text: The sixth season explores a new world, as the characters discover a habitable planet named Sanctum. However, they soon realize that this new world holds its own mysteries and challenges, and the search for answers continues.

summary.title: Season 7
summary.text: In the final season, the characters face the ultimate test as they confront the aftermath of previous events and a powerful alien force. The stakes are higher than ever as they strive to save humanity and secure the future of their species.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor

summary.text: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

When Hiccup and Toothless discover an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new wild dragons and the mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the center of a battle to protect the peace.
A group of intergalactic criminals are forced to work together to stop a fanatical warrior from taking control of the universe.

awards.title: Critics Choice Award
nominations: Best Actress in an Action Movie

summary.text: A soldier fighting aliens gets to relive the same day over and over again, the day restarting every time he dies.

As Steve Rogers struggles to embrace his role in the modern world, he teams up with a fellow Avenger and S.H.I.E.L.D agent, Black Widow, to battle a new threat from history: an assassin known as the Winter Soldier.
Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane traverses the world in a race against time to stop the Zombie pandemic that is toppling armies and governments, and threatening to destroy humanity itself.
When Dr. Jane Foster gets cursed with a powerful entity known as the Aether, Thor is heralded of the cosmic event known as the Convergence and the genocidal Dark Elves.
Wolverine comes to Japan to meet an old friend whose life he saved years ago, and gets embroiled in a conspiracy involving yakuza and mutants.
Katniss Everdeen and Peeta Mellark become targets of the Capitol after their victory in the 74th Hunger Games sparks a rebellion in the Districts of Panem.

title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug

summary.text: The dwarves, along with Bilbo Baggins and Gandalf the Grey, continue their quest to reclaim Erebor, their homeland, from Smaug. Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

After the crew of the Enterprise find an unstoppable force of terror from within their own organization, Captain Kirk leads a manhunt to a war-zone world to capture a one-man weapon of mass destruction.

As a war between humankind and monstrous sea creatures wages on, a former pilot and a trainee are paired up to drive a seemingly obsolete special weapon in a desperate effort to save the world from the apocalypse.
A veteran assigned to extract Earth's remaining resources begins to question what he knows about his mission and himself.
An F.B.I. Agent and an Interpol Detective track a team of illusionists who pull off bank heists during their performances, and reward their audiences with the money.

Clark Kent is an alien who as a child was evacuated from his dying world and came to Earth, living as a normal human. But when survivors of his alien home invade Earth, he must reveal himself to the world.
When Tony Stark's world is torn apart by a formidable terrorist called the Mandarin, he starts an odyssey of rebuilding and retribution.
Hobbs has Dominic and Brian reassemble their crew to take down a team of mercenaries: Dominic unexpectedly gets convoluted also facing his presumed deceased girlfriend, Letty.

awards.title: Annie
nominations: Outstanding Achievement in Storyboarding in an Animated TV/Broadcast Production
Outstanding Achievement in Production Design in an Animated TV/Broadcast Production

summary.title: Book One: Air
summary.text: Korra, the new Avatar, embarks on her journey to master airbending in Republic City. She faces the Equalists, a group led by Amon that seeks to rid the world of bending. As she learns more about the complexities of being the Avatar, she must restore balance and peace.

summary.title: Book Two: Spirits
summary.text: Korra faces new challenges as she delves into the spirit world and discovers the origins of bending. Civil unrest in Republic City and the appearance of dark spirits escalate the conflict. She must learn the ancient art of energybending and connect with her spiritual side.

summary.title: Book Three: Change
summary.text: In the third season, Korra faces the Red Lotus, a dangerous anarchist group that seeks to end the Avatar cycle. As she confronts formidable adversaries, she must rebuild the Air Nation, rediscover herself, and make challenging decisions for the world's future.

summary.title: Book Four: Balance
summary.text: The final season follows Korra as she deals with the aftermath of her traumatic battles. She faces Kuvira, an Earth Empire military leader who seeks to unite the Earth Kingdom. As Korra grapples with physical and emotional scars, she strives to bring balance to the world.

awards.title: Grammy
nominations: Best Song Written for Visual Media

summary.text: Katniss Everdeen voluntarily takes her younger sister's place in the Hunger Games: a televised competition in which two teenagers from each of the twelve Districts of Panem are chosen at random to fight to the death.
A reluctant Hobbit, Bilbo Baggins, sets out to the Lonely Mountain with a spirited group of dwarves to reclaim their mountain home, and the gold within it from the dragon Smaug.

Eight years after the Joker's reign of anarchy, Batman, with the help of the enigmatic Catwoman, is forced from his exile to save Gotham City, now on the edge of total annihilation, from the brutal guerrilla terrorist Bane.
Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team if they are going to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.
After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains newfound, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

Transported to Barsoom, a Civil War vet discovers a barren planet seemingly inhabited by 12-foot tall barbarians. Finding himself prisoner of these creatures, he escapes, only to encounter Woola and a princess in desperate need of a savior.

In the 1960s, superpowered humans Charles Xavier and Erik Lensherr work together to find others like them, but Erik's vengeful pursuit of an ambitious mutant who ruined his life causes a schism to divide them.
The Autobots learn of a Cybertronian spacecraft hidden on the moon, and race against the Decepticons to reach it and to learn its secrets.
The powerful, but arrogant god Thor, is cast out of Asgard to live amongst humans in Midgard (Earth), where he soon becomes one of their finest defenders.
After he becomes a quadriplegic from a paragliding accident, an aristocrat hires a young man from the projects to be his caregiver.
A soldier wakes up in someone else's body and discovers he's part of an experimental government program to find the bomber of a commuter train. A mission he has only 8 minutes to complete.
In the near future, robot boxing is a top sport. A struggling promoter feels he's found a champion in a discarded robot.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: On Stranger Tides

summary.text: Jack Sparrow and Barbossa embark on a quest to find the elusive fountain of youth, only to discover that Blackbeard and his daughter are after it too.
The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organization's name.

In a future where people stop aging at 25, but are engineered to live only one more year, having the means to buy your way out of the situation is a shot at immortal youth. Here, Will Salas finds himself accused of murder and on the run with a hostage - a connection that becomes an important part of the way against the system.
In Paris in 1931, an orphan named Hugo Cabret, who lives in the walls of a train station, is wrapped up in a mystery involving his late father and an automaton

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part II

summary.text: Harry, Ron, and Hermione search for Voldemort's remaining Horcruxes in their effort to destroy the Dark Lord as the final battle rages on at Hogwarts.

people.name: George R. R. Martin
people.comment: 2 episodes (written by), author of the original book "A Song of Ice and Fire"

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: The Seven Kingdoms of Westeros are in turmoil as noble families vie for the Iron Throne. Eddard Stark is appointed Hand of the King for his old friend Robert Baratheon. Meanwhile, Daenerys Targaryen seeks to reclaim her family's throne, and dark forces stir beyond the Wall in the North.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: War rages across Westeros as five kings lay claim to the Iron Throne. Robb Stark seeks independence for the North, Stannis Baratheon battles for the throne, and Daenerys Targaryen seeks allies to reclaim her birthright. The shadow of an ancient threat looms larger in the North.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: The struggle for power intensifies as chaos reigns in the Seven Kingdoms. Jon Snow explores beyond the Wall, while the Lannisters and Starks continue their deadly feud. Daenerys grows in strength and seeks an army to conquer Westeros, while a looming supernatural threat becomes more apparent.

summary.title: Season 4
summary.text: The War of the Five Kings begins to wind down, but new threats emerge. Tyrion Lannister faces trial for his life, Jon Snow navigates leadership at the Wall, and Daenerys consolidates her rule in Slaver's Bay. Dark and powerful enemies continue to rise in Westeros.

summary.title: Season 5
summary.text: Amidst the ongoing power struggles and machinations for the Iron Throne, Jon Snow becomes Lord Commander, Cersei faces her own challenges in King's Landing, and Daenerys contends with rebellion in Meereen. The White Walkers pose an increasingly dire threat to the realm.

summary.title: Season 6
summary.text: The battle for control of the Seven Kingdoms escalates as Jon Snow and Sansa Stark seek allies, Daenerys sails for Westeros, and Cersei consolidates power in King's Landing. The threat of the White Walkers becomes a central concern, and prophecies and destinies are fulfilled.

summary.title: Season 7
summary.text: The Great War looms as Daenerys and her allies set their sights on the Iron Throne. Jon Snow, now recognized as a Targaryen, must unite Westeros against the White Walker threat. Cersei Lannister retains her grip on King's Landing, creating a complex web of alliances and betrayals.

summary.title: Season 8
summary.text: The battle for the Iron Throne reaches its climax as Daenerys, Jon Snow, and others confront their destinies. The White Walkers advance, and the living must unite against the impending doom. The fate of Westeros and its rulers is decided in a series of epic confrontations.
Dominic Toretto and his crew of street racers plan a massive heist to buy their freedom while in the sights of a powerful Brazilian drug lord and a dangerous federal agent.

Steve Rogers, a rejected military soldier transforms into Captain America after taking a dose of a "Super-Soldier serum". But being Captain America comes at a price as he attempts to take down a war monger and a terrorist organization.
With an unmanned, half-mile-long freight train barreling toward a city, a veteran engineer and a young conductor race against the clock to prevent a catastrophe.

The son of a virtual world designer goes looking for his father and ends up inside the digital world that his father designed. He meets his father's corrupted creation and a unique ally who was born inside the digital world.
Master sorcerer Balthazar Blake must find and train Merlin's descendant to defeat dark sorceress Morgana la Fée.

awards.title: Emmy
nominations: Outstanding Special Visual Effects in a Supporting Role
Outstanding Lead Actor in a Miniseries or a Movie
Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Miniseries or a Movie
Outstanding Writing for a Miniseries or a Dramatic Special
Outstanding Cinematography for a Miniseries or Movie
Outstanding Music Composition for a Miniseries
Movie or a Special (Original Dramatic Score)
Outstanding Single-Camera Picture Editing for a Miniseries or a Movie
Outstanding Sound Editing for a Miniseries

summary.title: Season 1
summary.text: In the debut season, viewers are introduced to Sherlock Holmes and Dr. John Watson, who become flatmates in modern-day London. Together, they tackle a series of perplexing cases, including a string of suicides that Sherlock believes are connected by a shadowy antagonist.

summary.title: Season 2
summary.text: In the second season, Sherlock continues to astound with his deductive abilities, but he faces even more formidable adversaries. Moriarty, a brilliant and dangerous criminal mastermind, becomes his primary nemesis. The season is filled with high-stakes conflicts and intricate puzzles.

summary.title: Season 3
summary.text: Season 3 explores Sherlock's return from a two-year absence, during which he was believed to be dead. The dynamic between Sherlock and Watson is tested as they confront new mysteries, including a wedding, a case of a disappearing train, and a deadly adversary from the past.

summary.title: Season 4
summary.text: The fourth season delves deeper into Sherlock's complex personal life and his troubled past. It features an enigmatic new villain, Culverton Smith, and a series of cases that bring Sherlock to the brink of despair. Dark secrets and unexpected revelations surface, challenging the detective like never before.

title: Prince of Persia: The Sand of Time

summary.text: A young fugitive Prince and Princess must stop a villain who unknowingly threatens to destroy the world with a special dagger that enables the magic sand inside to reverse time.

title: Percy Jackson & the Olympians: The Lightning Thief

summary.text: A teenager discovers he's the descendant of a Greek god and sets out on an adventure to settle an on-going battle between the gods.
With the world now aware of his identity as Iron Man, Tony Stark must contend with both his declining health and a vengeful mad man with ties to his father's legacy.
A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.
A hapless young Viking who aspires to hunt dragons becomes the unlikely friend of a young dragon himself, and learns there may be more to the creatures than he assumed.

title: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part I

summary.text: As Harry races against time and evil to destroy the Horcruxes, he uncovers the existence of three most powerful objects in the wizarding world: the Deathly Hallows.
The early years of James Logan, featuring his rivalry with his brother Victor Creed, his service in the special forces team Weapon X, and his experimentation into the metal-lined mutant Wolverine.
Sam Witwicky leaves the Autobots behind for a normal life. But when his mind is filled with cryptic symbols, the Decepticons target him and he is dragged back into the Transformers' war.

In 2018, a mysterious new weapon in the war against the machines, half-human and half-machine, comes to John Connor on the eve of a resistance attack on Skynet. But whose side is he on, and can he be trusted?

The brash James T. Kirk tries to live up to his father's legacy with Mr. Spock keeping him in check as a vengeful Romulan from the future creates black holes to destroy the Federation one planet at a time.

title: Ice Age: Dawn of the Dinosaurs

summary.text: When Sid's attempt to adopt three dinosaur eggs gets him abducted by their real mother to an underground lost world, his friends attempt to rescue him.

title: Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince

summary.text: As Harry Potter begins his sixth year at Hogwarts, he discovers an old book marked as 	he property of the Half-Blood Prince" and begins to learn more about Lord Voldemort's dark past.
Brian O'Conner, back working for the FBI in Los Angeles, teams up with Dominic Toretto to bring down a heroin importer by infiltrating his operation.

Damien and Leito return to District 13 on a mission to bring peace to the troubled sector that is controlled by five different gang bosses, before the city's secret services take drastic measures to solve the problem.
A paraplegic marine dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission becomes torn between following his orders and protecting the world he feels is his home.
A frustrated writer struggles to keep his family alive when a series of global catastrophes threatens to annihilate mankind.

awards.title: Oscar
nominations: Best Animated Feature Film of the Year

summary.text: In the distant future, a small waste-collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

Frank Martin puts the driving gloves on to deliver Valentina, the kidnapped daughter of a Ukrainian government official, from Marseilles to Odessa on the Black Sea. En route, he has to contend with thugs who want to intercept Valentina's safe delivery and not let his personal feelings get in the way of his dangerous objective.

title: The Mummy: Tomb of Dragon Emperor

summary.text: In the Far East, Alex O'Connell, the son of famed mummy fighters Rick and Evy O'Connell, unearths the mummy of the first Emperor of Qin -- a shape-shifting entity cursed by a witch centuries ago.

title: The Librarian: Curse of the Judas Chalice

summary.text: Losing his girlfriend because he was at an auction dramatically getting the magical philosopher's stone instead of a date, he needs a vacation - New Orleans but finds himself busy saving Earth from the curse of the Judas chalice/vampires.
Bruce Banner, a scientist on the run from the U.S. Government, must find a cure for the monster he turns into, whenever he loses his temper.

title: The Day the Earth Stood Still

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor

summary.text: A remake of the 1951 classic science fiction film about an alien visitor and his giant robot counterpart who visit Earth.

awards.title: Oscar
nominations: Best Performance by an Actor in a Supporting Role

summary.text: When the menace known as the Joker emerges from his mysterious past, he wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham. The Dark Knight must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Prince Caspian

summary.text: The Pevensie siblings return to Narnia, where they are enlisted to once again help ward off an evil king and restore the rightful heir to the land's throne, Prince Caspian.

The Madagascar animals fly back to New York City, but crash-land on an African nature reserve, where they meet others of their own kind, and Alex especially discovers his royal heritage as prince of a lion pride.

The Dragon Warrior has to clash against the savage Tai Lung as China's fate hangs in the balance. However, the Dragon Warrior mantle is supposedly mistaken to be bestowed upon an obese panda who is a novice in martial arts.
After being held captive in an Afghan cave, baire engineer Tony Stark creates a unique weaponized suit of armor to fight evil.

title: Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull

summary.text: In 1957, archaeologist and adventurer Dr. Henry "Indiana" Jones, Jr. is called back into action and becomes entangled in a Soviet plot to uncover the secret behind mysterious artifacts known as the Crystal Skulls.
Hancock is a superhero whose ill considered behavior regularly causes damage in the millions. He changes when the person he saves helps him improve his public image.
An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.
A strange black entity from another world bonds with Peter Parker and causes inner turmoil as he contends with new villains, temptations, and revenge.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: At World's End

summary.text: Captain Barbossa, Will Turner and Elizabeth Swann must sail off the edge of the map, navigate treachery and betrayal, find Jack Sparrow, and make their final alliances for one last decisive battle.
Years after a plague kills most of humanity and transforms the rest into monsters, the sole survivor in New York City struggles valiantly to find a cure.

title: Harry Potter and the Order of the Phoenix

summary.text: With their warning about Lord Voldemort's return scoffed at, Harry and Dumbledore are targeted by the Wizard authorities as an authoritarian bureaucrat slowly seizes power at Hogwarts.
When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

The human government develops a cure for mutations, and Jean Gray becomes a darker uncontrollable persona called the Phoenix who allies with Magneto, causing escalation into an all-out battle for the X-Men.

title: The Librarian: Return to King Solomon's Mines

summary.text: Librarian-turned-adventurer Flynn Carsen endeavors to find King Solomon's mines.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Man's Chest

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: Jack Sparrow races to recover the heart of Davy Jones to avoid enslaving his soul to Jones' service, as other friends and foes seek the heart for their own agenda as well.
IMF Agent Ethan Hunt comes into conflict with a dangerous and sadistic arms dealer who threatens his life and his fiancée in response.

Manny, Sid, and Diego discover that the ice age is coming to an end, and join everybody for a journey to higher ground. On the trip, they discover that Manny, in fact, is not the last of the woolly mammoths.

awards.title: Emmy
nominations: Outstanding Special Visual Effects for a Series

summary.title: Volume 1: Genesis
summary.text: Ordinary people discover they possess extraordinary abilities. As they come to terms with their powers, they must navigate the mysteries surrounding their origins and the looming threat of a catastrophe that could change the world.

summary.title: Volume 2: Generations
summary.text: The characters continue to explore their powers while new individuals with abilities emerge. A global conspiracy and the hunt for a virus add to the intrigue as the heroes try to prevent a deadly outbreak.

summary.title: Volume 3. Part 1: Villains
summary.text: The heroes face new challenges as they confront government scrutiny and a malevolent villain, Arthur Petrelli. The discovery of dangerous abilities and a divided group of heroes complicate their mission to save the world from powerful threats.

summary.title: Volume 3. Part 2: Fugitives
summary.text: The heroes continue their journey, facing government forces and an ever-growing threat. A new organization, Building 26, seeks to control those with abilities, forcing the heroes into a fugitive lifestyle as they strive to protect themselves and others.

summary.title: Volume 4: Redemption
summary.text: The heroes deals with the carnage caused by a carnival of people with abilities. They must unite to thwart the carnival's leader, Samuel Sullivan, and face their destinies in an epic showdown.

awards.title: Oscar
nominations: Best Animated Feature Film of the Year

summary.text: Into the world of the Emperor Penguins, who find their soul mates through song, a penguin is born who cannot sing. But he can tap dance something fierce!
A teenager becomes a major competitor in the world of drift racing after moving in with his father in Tokyo to avoid a jail sentence in America.

After earning 00 status and a licence to kill, secret agent James Bond sets out on his first mission as 007. Bond must defeat a private banker funding terrorists in a high-stakes game of poker at Casino Royale, Montenegro.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor (Dakota Fanning)

summary.text: An alien invasion threatens the future of humanity. The catastrophic nightmare is depicted through the eyes of one American family fighting for survival.
Mercenary Frank Martin, who specializes moving goods of all kinds, surfaces again this time in Miami, Florida when he's implicated in the kidnapping of the young son of a powerful USA official.

title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe

summary.text: Four kids travel through a wardrobe to the land of Narnia and learn of their destiny to free it with the guidance of a mystical lion.

title: Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith

summary.text: Three years into the Clone Wars, the Jedi rescue Palpatine from Count Dooku. As Obi-Wan pursues a new threat, Anakin acts as a double agent between the Jedi Council and Palpatine and is lured into a sinister plan to rule the galaxy.
A group of animals who have spent all their life in a New York zoo end up in the jungles of Madagascar, and must adjust to living in the wild.
While helping his latest client woo the fine lady of his dreams, a professional "date doctor" finds that his game doesn't quite work on the gossip columnist with whom he's smitten.

title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

summary.text: A young wizard finds himself competing in a hazardous tournament between rival schools of magic, but he is distracted by recurring nightmares.
After training with his mentor, Batman begins his fight to free crime-ridden Gotham City from corruption.

awards.title: Annie
nominations: Best Animated Television Production Produced for Children
Best Directing in an Animated Television Production or Short Form
Best Character Animation in a Television Production
Best Directing in an Animated Television Production
Best Storyboarding in an Animated Television Production

summary.title: Book 1: Water
summary.text: Follow the journey of Aang, the last Airbender and the Avatar, as he awakens from a century-long slumber to a world ravaged by war. With the help of new friends Katara and Sokka, he embarks on a quest to master the elements and bring balance to a world torn by the Fire Nation's aggression.

summary.title: Book 2: Earth
summary.text: Aang continues his training as the Avatar, facing new challenges and adventures. The group confronts the Earth Kingdom's struggles, uncovers the secrets of the spirit world, and Aang delves deeper into his connection with the Avatar State, all while the Fire Nation intensifies its pursuit.

summary.title: Book 3: Fire
summary.text: Aang and his friends prepare for the ultimate showdown with the Fire Nation and its tyrannical ruler, Fire Lord Ozai. The group faces personal dilemmas and tough choices, while the world holds its breath, waiting for the Avatar's triumph and the restoration of balance.

title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear

summary.text: A bookworm becomes the librarian. Same night a magical spear gets stolen and he's off to get some real life experience around the globe on his quest for the spear - starting with being thrown off a plane over Amazonas by his cute helper.

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: Jack Hall, paleoclimatologist, must make a daring trek from Washington, D.C. to New York City to reach his son, trapped in the cross-hairs of a sudden international storm which plunges the planet into a new Ice Age.
Peter Parker is beset with troubles in his failing personal life as he battles a brilliant scientist named Doctor Otto Octavius.

Shrek and Fiona travel to the Kingdom of Far Far Away, where Fiona's parents are King and Queen, to celebrate their marriage. When they arrive, they find they are not as welcome as they thought they would be.
In 2035, a technophobic cop investigates a crime that may have been perpetrated by a robot, which leads to a larger threat to humanity.

title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

summary.text: It's Harry's third year at Hogwarts; not only does he have a new "Defense Against the Dark Arts" teacher, but there is also trouble brewing. Convicted murderer Sirius Black has escaped the Wizards' Prison and is coming after Harry.
Set in the ghettos of Paris in 2010, an undercover cop and ex-thug try to infiltrate a gang in order to defuse a neutron bomb.
When anti-mutant colonel William Stryker kidnaps Professor X and attacks his school, the X-Men must ally with their archenemy Magneto to stop him.
The human city of Zion defends itself against the massive invasion of the machines as Neo fights to end the war at another front while also opposing the rogue Agent Smith.

Neo and the rebel leaders estimate that they have 72 hours until 250,000 probes discover Zion and destroy it and its inhabitants. During this, Neo must decide how he can save Trinity from a dark fate in his dreams.

title: The Lord of the Rings: Return of the King

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom with the One Ring.
In an alternate Victorian Age world, a group of famous contemporary fantasy, science fiction, and adventure characters team up on a secret mission.
Out to stop a new gang disguised as Santa Claus, Emilien and Daniel must also handle major changes in their personal relationships.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl

summary.text: Blacksmith Will Turner teams up with eccentric pirate Captain Jack Sparrow to save his love, the governor's daughter, from Jack's former pirate allies, who are now undead.
After his son is captured in the Great Barrier Reef and taken to Sydney, a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.
Former cop Brian O'Conner is called upon to bust a dangerous criminal and he recruits the help of a former childhood friend and street racer who has a chance to redeem himself.
Frank is hired to "transport" packages for unknown clients and has made a very good living doing so. But when asked to move a package that begins moving, complications arise.
Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: While Frodo and Sam edge closer to Mordor with the help of the shifty Gollum, the divided fellowship makes a stand against Sauron's new ally, Saruman, and his hordes of Isengard.

title: Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones

summary.text: Ten years after initially meeting, Anakin Skywalker shares a forbidden romance with Padmé Amidala, while Obi-Wan investigates an assassination attempt on the senator and discovers a secret clone army crafted for the Jedi.

When bitten by a genetically modified spider, a nerdy, shy, and awkward high school student gains spider-like abilities that he eventually must use to fight evil as a superhero after tragedy befalls his family.
Agent J needs help so he is sent to find Agent K and restore his memory.
Set during the Ice Age, a sabertooth tiger, a sloth, and a wooly mammoth find a lost human infant, and they try to return him to his tribe.

title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

summary.text: Harry ignores warnings not to return to Hogwarts, only to find the school plagued by a series of mysterious attacks and a strange voice haunting him
The mummified body of Imhotep is shipped to a museum in London, where he once again wakes and begins his campaign of rage and terror.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: A meek Hobbit from the Shire and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful One Ring and save The World of Middle-earth from the Dark Lord Sauron.
Los Angeles police officer Brian O'Connor must decide where his loyalty really lies when he becomes enamored with the street racing world he has been sent undercover to destroy.
A mean lord exiles fairytale creatures to the swamp of a grumpy ogre, who must go on a quest and rescue a princess for the lord in order to get his land back.

awards.title: Grammy
nominations: Best Song Written for Visual Media

summary.text: In order to power the city, monsters have to scare children so that they scream. However, the children are toxic to the monsters, and after a child gets through, 2 monsters realize things may not be what they think.
A decidedly odd couple with ulterior motives convince Dr. Grant to go to Isla Sorna for a holiday, but their unexpected landing startles the island's new inhabitants.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone

summary.text: An orphaned boy enrolled in a school of wizardry, where he learns the truth about himself, his family and the terrible evil that haunts the magical world.
In a world where mutants (evolved super-powered humans) exist and are discriminated against, two groups form for an inevitable clash: the supremacist Brotherhood, and the pacifist X-Men.
Police inspector Emilien and his taxi-driver pal Daniel are back, this time on the tail of a group of Japanese yakuza.
IMF Agent Ethan Hunt is sent to Sydney, to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called "Chimera".

At an archaeological dig in the ancient city of Hamunaptra, an American serving in the French Foreign Legion accidentally awakens a mummy who begins to wreck havoc as he searches for the reincarnation of his long-lost love.

awards.title: Golden Globes
nominations: Best Actress in a Leading Role
Best Actor in a Leading Role

awards.title: BAFTA
nominations: Best Achievement in Special Visual Effects

summary.text: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace

summary.text: Two Jedi Knights escape a hostile blockade to find allies and come across a young boy who may bring balance to the Force, but the long dormant Sith resurface to claim their old glory.
To work off his tarnished driving record, a hip taxi driver must chauffeur a loser police inspector on the trail of German bank robbers.
A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic.
A research team is sent to the Jurassic Park Site B island to study the dinosaurs there, while an InGen team approaches with another agenda.
A police officer joins a secret organization that polices and monitors extraterrestrial interactions on Earth.
An American agent, under false suspicion of disloyalty, must discover and expose the real spy without the help of his organization.
The aliens are coming and their goal is to invade and destroy Earth. Fighting superior technology, mankind's best weapon is the will to survive.
When two kids find and play a magical board game, they release a man trapped for decades in it and a host of dangers that can only be stopped by finishing the game.
A young police officer must prevent a bomb exploding aboard a city bus by keeping its speed above 50 mph.
A pragmatic paleontologist visiting an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure causes the park's cloned dinosaurs to run loose.
A cyborg, identical to the one who failed to kill Sarah Connor, must now protect her teenage son, John Connor, from a more advanced and powerful cyborg.

title: Back to the Future: Part III

summary.text: Enjoying a peaceable existence in 1885, Doctor Emmet Brown is about to be killed by Buford "Mad Dog"Tannen. Marty McFly travels back in time to save his friend.

title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade

summary.text: In 1938, after his father Professor Henry Jones, Sr. goes missing while pursuing the Holy Grail, Professor Henry "Indiana" Jones, Jr. finds himself up against Adolf Hitler's Nazis again to stop them from obtaining its powers.

title: Back to the Future: Part II

summary.text: After visiting 2015, Marty McFly must repeat his visit to 1955 to prevent disastrous changes to 1985...without interfering with his first trip.
A team of commandos on a mission in a Central American jungle find themselves hunted by an extraterrestrial warrior.

awards.title: Saturn
nominations: Best Performance by a Younger Actor (Carrie Henn)

summary.text: Fifty-seven years after surviving an apocalyptic attack aboard her space vessel by merciless space creatures, Officer Ripley awakens from hyper-sleep and tries to warn anyone who will listen about the predators.
Marty McFly, a 17-year-old high school student, is accidentally sent thirty years into the past in a time-traveling DeLorean invented by his close friend, the maverick scientist Doc Brown.

A seemingly indestructible android is sent from 2029 to 1984 to assassinate a waitress, whose unborn son will lead humanity in a war against the machines, while a soldier from that war is sent to protect her at all costs.

title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom

summary.text: In 1935, Indiana Jones arrives in India, still part of the British Empire, and is asked to find a mystical stone. He then stumbles upon a secret cult committing enslavement and human sacrifices in the catacombs of an ancient palace.

title: Star Wars Episode VI: Return of the Jedi

summary.text: After a daring mission to rescue Han Solo from Jabba the Hutt, the rebels dispatch to Endor to destroy a more powerful Death Star. Meanwhile, Luke struggles to help Vader back from the dark side without falling into the Emperor's trap.

title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark

summary.text: In 1936, archaeologist and adventurer Indiana Jones is hired by the U.S. government to find the Ark of the Covenant before Adolf Hitler's Nazis can obtain its awesome powers.

title: Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back

summary.text: After the rebels are brutally overpowered by the Empire on the ice planet Hoth, Luke Skywalker begins Jedi training with Yoda, while his friends are pursued by Darth Vader.
After a space merchant vessel receives an unknown transmission as a distress call, one of the crew is attacked by a mysterious life form and they soon realize that its life cycle has merely begun.

title: Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope

summary.text: Luke Skywalker joins forces with a Jedi Knight, a cocky pilot, a Wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the Empire's world-destroying battle station, while also attempting to rescue Princess Leia from the evil Darth Vader.
